activities_projects.title: Osmosis with Potato Cups
steps: Cut a potato into two halves and scoop a cavity
Fill one cavity with sugar and another with salt
Place them in water and observe after 1 hour

activities_projects.title: Cell Organelle Function Chart
activities_projects.objective: Explain functions of major cell organelles
steps: Draw major organelles such as nucleus, ER, mitochondria and Golgi apparatus
Write the function of each organelle
Present the chart to the class

activities_projects.title: Observation of Cell Division Images
steps: Observe diagrams of mitosis in the textbook
Write the stages in correct order
Draw and label each stage

activities_projects.title: Diffusion Rate Experiment
steps: Add food color to hot water and cold water separately
Observe spreading of color
Compare diffusion rates

activities_projects.title: Plant vs Animal Cell Model Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare plant and animal cell structures
steps: Make two models representing plant and animal cells
Label major organelles
Highlight structural differences
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of model and labels (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Prokaryotic vs Eukaryotic Cell Table
steps: List characteristics of prokaryotic cells
List characteristics of eukaryotic cells
Create a comparison table

activities_projects.title: Microscope Usage Demonstration
steps: Adjust the microscope using coarse adjustment
Focus using fine adjustment
Observe prepared slide and draw structure

activities_projects.title: Cell Organelle Flashcard Game
steps: Write organelle names on flashcards
Write functions on separate cards
Students match organelles with correct functions

activities_projects.title: Observation of Chloroplast in Leaf Cells
steps: Prepare a thin leaf peel
Place it on a slide with water
Observe green chloroplasts under microscope

activities_projects.title: Cell Organelles Role Play
steps: Assign students different organelles as roles
Each student explains their function
Class discusses cell coordination
